headline: Cisco (CSCO) Eyes SentinelOne As Italy And Bahrain Data Center Push Expands
summary: Cisco Systems is rumored to be a leading candidate to acquire AI-focused cybersecurity company SentinelOne, which holds FedRAMP High authorization. The potential deal is described as a way for Cisco to strengthen its security portfolio at a time when its own security revenue was reported as flat. Separately, Cisco is expanding its data center footprint in Italy and Bahrain, in line with trends in AI, machine learning, big data, and IoT infrastructure. Cisco Systems, NasdaqGS:CSCO, is...
